comment: Strict ingestion bounds defining what feeds the graph layer. Sidecars do not overwrite canon.

canonical_graph_substrate.description: The only surfaces allowed to define canonical graph nodes and edge semantics.

graph_toolchain_sidecars.description: Tools that project over the graph but do not define canon truth.

secondary_evidence_corpus.description: Sims, audits, math, geometry work. Enriches graph as attributed evidence layers only.

proposal_corpus.description: Antigravity brains, prompt batches, external audits. Must enter as staging/proposal nodes.

legacy_or_staging.description: Use with caution. Must not be flattened into canon.

ingestion_rules: fingerprint every source by repo + path + commit/file hash
never merge semantically similar nodes unless provenance and authority match
allow contradiction to remain visible in the graph
